name: Retrace
description: Records, replays, forks, and shares AI agent runs — forks re-issue only LLM calls while tool calls replay from tape, turning production failures into regression tests and PR eval gates.

skills.name: Record & Replay
skills.description: Records agent runs and replays them deterministically, re-issuing only LLM calls while tools play from tape.

skills.name: Fork Runs
skills.description: Forks a captured run to test prompt or code changes against the exact same production context.

skills.name: Eval Gates
skills.description: Turns captured failures into regression tests and PR eval gates that block regressions in CI.
